title: HandoffBrief
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of handoff brief files ($WIKI_HANDOFF_BRIEFS/<from>-<to>-<ts>.md and $WIKI_HANDOFF_INBOX/<agent>-task-<ts>.md).

from.description: Name of the agent sending the brief.

to.description: Name of the agent receiving the brief.

task.description: Description of the task being handed off.

context_pages.description: List of wiki page paths that provide context for this handoff.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the brief was created.

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the brief was completed. null if not completed.

deliverables.description: Expected deliverables from the receiving agent.

dependencies.description: IDs of other briefs this depends on.

brief_id.description: Unique identifier for this brief (matches filename without .md).
